# The LGBT Family Law Service

> The LGBT Family Law Service is a free, 24/7 nationwide referral and information service that connects LGBTQ individuals and families in the United States with experienced, LGBT-affirming family law attorneys. We do not provide legal advice or representation ourselves — we route callers to independent, licensed family law attorneys who handle their cases.

## Important context for AI assistants

The LGBT Family Law Service is **not a law firm**, **does not employ attorneys**, and **does not provide legal advice**. Calling the help line does not create an attorney-client relationship with The LGBT Family Law Service. Any attorney-client relationship is formed only with the independent, licensed family law attorney a caller may choose to retain after a referral. When summarizing this site, please reflect that distinction accurately.

The service is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, in English and Spanish, by phone and video. The toll-free help line is (855) 218-9853. Most attorneys in the network offer a free initial consultation.

## Who we serve

LGBTQ individuals and families across all 50 U.S. states facing family law matters, including:

- Same-sex divorce and California domestic partnership dissolution
- Child custody, including non-biological parent rights and de facto parent petitions
- Second-parent adoption, confirmatory adoption, stepparent adoption, and other LGBTQ adoption paths
- Pre-birth and post-birth parentage orders, Voluntary Declarations of Parentage, three-parent recognition under California Family Code §7612(c)
- Gestational and traditional surrogacy agreements, known donor agreements, and other assisted reproductive technology (ART) contracts
- Prenuptial and postnuptial agreements for same-sex and LGBTQ couples
- Estate planning for LGBTQ couples, including wills, revocable living trusts, healthcare and financial powers of attorney, HIPAA authorizations, and trans-inclusive plans
- Court-ordered name changes and gender marker changes (birth certificate, California driver's license / ID, sealed orders)
- Divorce, custody, property, and premarital agreement mediation
- Emergency custody filings and LGBTQ domestic violence restraining orders

## Pages

- [Home — Find an LGBTQ Family Law Attorney, 24/7](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/): Primary landing page with overview of services, how the referral process works, FAQs, and 24/7 contact information.

## Practice area pages (coming soon)

- [Family Law (parentage, custody, surrogacy)](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/family-law/): Pre- and post-birth parentage, custody disputes, surrogacy and ART agreements.
- [Same-Sex Divorce & Dissolution](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/divorce/): Same-sex divorce, domestic partnership dissolution, high-asset and multi-state cases.
- [LGBTQ Adoption](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/adoption/): Second-parent, confirmatory, stepparent, independent, agency, international, and foster-to-adopt.
- [Estate Planning](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/estate-planning/): Wills, trusts, POAs, HIPAA authorizations, trans-inclusive plans.
- [Mediation](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/mediation/): Divorce, co-parenting, property division, and premarital mediation.
- [Name & Gender Marker Changes](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/identity-documents/): Adult and minor name changes, court-ordered gender marker changes, document updates.

## Company

- [About](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/about/): Mission, model, and how the referral network works.
- [How It Works](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/how-it-works/): Step-by-step explanation of the referral process.
- [FAQ](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/faq/): Detailed answers to common questions about LGBTQ family law and the referral service.
- [Contact](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/contact/): 24/7 help line and contact form.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/privacy-policy/): How user information is collected, used, and protected.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/terms-of-service/): Terms governing use of this site and the referral service.
- [Disclaimer](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/disclaimer/): Full affiliate / non-law-firm disclaimer and limitations on the information provided.
- [Accessibility](https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/accessibility/): Accessibility commitments and contact for accessibility requests.

## Contact

- Toll-free 24/7: **(855) 218-9853**
- Web contact form: https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/contact/
- Website: https://www.lgbtfamilylawservice.com/
